subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Thou hast attained unto the pure wine of revelation, and hast quaffed from the Kawthar of immortality from the hand of bounty, and art mentioned time and again [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل انک فزت برحیق الوحی و شربت کوثر البقاء من ید العطاء و ذکرت مره بعد
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @nearness and remoteness, @call to action
